title: ANEW start for Wilderness Hotel
description: GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - The Wilderness Hotel...
bodyText:
Video

GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - The Wilderness Hotel is entering an exciting new era under new management following an agreement struck between the owners of the hotel and ANEW Hotels & Resorts, a group that runs 17 hotel and resort properties in South Africa.

Albert Wiffen, a director of the hotel, said they are excited.


> "Their taking over the management involves renewing and upgrading of the hotel, and hopefully an increase in visitor numbers.


"We were approached by ANEW because they were looking for a footprint in the Garden Route."

ANEW did not want to comment at this stage.

The Wildernes Hotel was first opened in 1928 and is very much part of local history.

A large section was destroyed by a fire in the middle 80s, but it was rebuilt and has since changed hands a few times.

The hotel underwent renovations when Wiffen became co-owner in 2015.


> VIDEO - Top tips to boost tourism to the Garden Route:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
